arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Campus Round Up: Bunch of late drama, a player makes his comeback after 19 month absence, UEFA Youth League is about to begin and more...
arts.sum: Brilliant work by striker Jonah Kusi-Asare and Kurt Rüger set up Maximilian Wagner for the crucial first goal in the 87th before a beautifully floated cross from Adam Aznou found the head of Kusi-Asare in the 93rd minute whose header was deflected into the back of the net by an unfortunate defender. Bayern dominated and pushed Aubstadt back far into their own half, but a goal was not to come.

arts.ttl: Transfer Update: Leon Goretzka could leave Bayern Munich this winter
arts.sum: Goretzka was heavily linked with a move away from Bayern during the summer transfer window, but nothing wound up materializing despite Max Eberl making it clear to the player he really is not in Vincent Kompany’s primary plans for this season. Goretzka is hardly playing under Vincent Kompany, so it could be time for him to part ways with Bayern.

arts.ttl: "We felt more comfortable" - Bayern chief explains Matthijs de Ligt sale to Man Utd
arts.sum: Bayern Munich director of sport Max Eberl defends the club's decision to sell defender Matthijs de Ligt to Manchester United this summer.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich chief hands Man City, Real Madrid additional Jamal Musiala transfer boost
arts.sum: Bayern Munich chief Max Eberl admits that it will be "difficult" to agree a contract extension with Manchester City and Real Madrid-linked Jamal Musiala.

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Bayern Munich expressed summer interest in Girona star
arts.sum: Two of the continent’s leading clubs expressed a keen interest in the signature of a member of the defensive ranks at La Liga outfit Girona over the summer. That’s according…

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany says there’s no difference in how Bayern Munich differentiates between Dinamo Zagreb and FC Barcelona
arts.sum: In his pregame press conference, Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany wanted to stress that he respect Dinamo Zagreb — and also that his team does not do anything different whether it is facing Dinamo Zagreb or FC Barcelona . It’s a team that’s good at defending the box, they don’t give up much space.

arts.ttl: Will Leon Goretzka get any minutes at Bayern Munich from the fallout with Sacha Boey’s injury?
arts.sum: According to a report from Bild (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich is planning to dress Leon Goretzka for Tuesday’s Champions League match against Dinamo Zagreb, but whether or not he gets any actual playing time remains to be seen: Leon Goretzka is expected back in the squad against Dinamo Zagreb tomorrow as the club is allowed to include more players in the Champions League squad than in the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Bundesliga Power Rankings: Matchday 3 — Bayern Munich is back on top!
arts.sum: Loïs Openda was the difference maker in the upset over Leverkusen, but he was the scapegoat today as he scuffed his penalty kick in the 74th minute that would’ve won the match and kept the perfect season alive for Leipzig. Three minutes later, Freiburg were stonewalled three times at the goal line before Adamu’s header finally ricocheted through the defense for the game winner.

arts.ttl: Man City, Barcelona transfer news: Bayern man reveals his happiness at club
arts.sum: Bayern Munich's Joshua Kimmich appears to be happy to be stay at the club following recent comments to German TV amid links to Barcelona and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer “believes” in Leon Goretzka after omission from Bayern Munich squad
arts.sum: Leon Goretzka has played just one minute of football across four games for Bayern Munich this season, but compatriot Manuel Neuer believes his teammate can bounce back after been excluded…
